title: Procedural Financial Tower
description: A procedural financial tower with exact seed 1042 settings, semantic podium shaft crown bridge and roof planning, reserved central glass and corner zones, projected colonnade and trim modules, vertex-colored material-slot geometry compilation, WebGPU node materials, and three light-space cached shadow levels with texel snapping, cross-fades, age, and update budgeting.
backend: WebGPU / TSL node materials and cached clipmap shadows
techniques: semantic facade modules and reserved zones
cached shadow update budget and cross-fade
